verses.text: Joshua is old; much land yet remains to be possessed. Land remains. The work is not finished.
Joshua is old; much land yet remains to be possessed. Land remains. The work is not finished.
Joshua is old; much land yet remains to be possessed. Land remains. The work is not finished.
God bids divide the remaining land by lot. Divide. The inheritance is apportioned.
God bids divide the remaining land by lot. Divide. The inheritance is apportioned.

God bids divide the remaining land by lot. Divide. The inheritance is apportioned.
The east land of Sihon and Og is recalled. The east. Their portion is noted.
The east land of Sihon and Og is recalled. The east. Their portion is noted.

Geshur and Maachah were not driven out. Not driven. Some remained among them.
Levi has no inheritance, but the offerings of the LORD. Levi. The LORD is their portion.
Reuben's portion and its cities are described. Reuben. The east tribe's land.

Gad's portion is described. Gad. Their inheritance is set.
Gad's portion is described. Gad. Their inheritance is set.

Half Manasseh's portion east of Jordan is given. Manasseh. The half-tribe's land.

Levi has no land; the LORD God is their inheritance. Their portion. God is their wealth.
